    A

    addContract() - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.HelloController
    Handles the "Add Contract" button action.
    addContract(Contract) - Method in class org.example.oopjavagroupproject.data.ContractDao
    Adds a new contract to the database.

    Handles the "Add Faculty" button action.

    Handles the "Add Room" button action.
